ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the location where the precinct is situated */,
  "registration" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of precinct (e.g., polling place, VBM portion) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the precinct */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the precinct */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates for mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* Candidate's official website */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., senate, mayoral, gubernatorial) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the election */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the election */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the election is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who received the votes */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., in-person, mail-in) */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the voter is registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the voter's registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_cast" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot cast */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the ballot was cast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the ballot belongs to */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot cast (e.g., polling place, VBM portion) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ballot was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballot_cast_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballot_cast_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, auditor, official) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election affected by the change */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct affected by the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the official (e.g., commissioner, clerk) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the summary belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the summary belongs to */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Name of the winning candidate */,
  "turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "invalid_vote_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of invalid votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_summary_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_summary_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
